title: Preparing for Vaping Products Duty and the Vaping Duty Stamps Scheme
body: "This brief explains:   that from 1 April 2026, applications for approval for Vaping Products Duty and vaping duty stamps will open why you should apply as early as possible to make sure you have the necessary approval before 1 October 2026 that from 1 October 2026, you must pay Vaping Products Duty on vaping products and attach a vaping duty stamp on all your retail packaging that from 1 April 2027, all vaping products outside of duty suspension in the UK must have a vaping duty stamp attached the rate of duty for vaping products and how to work out how much Vaping Products Duty you’ll need to pay which vaping products you’ll need to include for Vaping Products Duty  how and when you’ll need to use vaping duty stamps  the storing, holding and moving of vaping products about keeping records what happens if you do not follow the Vaping Products Duty rules and the penalties you may incur   Briefings are for guidance only and reflect HMRC’s position at the time of writing. "

taxons.title: Vaping Products Duty and Stamps Scheme
